glosses.en: to go on strike; to break down (machine)
glosses.ro: a face grevă; a se strica
glosses.ja: ストライキをする; 故障する

translations.en: The bus drivers are on strike today.
translations.es: Hoy los conductores de autobús están en huelga.
translations.fr: Les conducteurs de bus sont en grève aujourd’hui.
translations.it: Oggi gli autisti degli autobus sono in sciopero.
translations.pt: Hoje os motoristas de ônibus estão em greve.
translations.vi: Hôm nay các tài xế xe buýt đang đình công.
translations.hi: आज बस चालक हड़ताल पर हैं.
translations.id: Hari ini para sopir bus mogok.
translations.ro: Astăzi șoferii de autobuz sunt în grevă.
translations.ja: 今日はバスの運転手がストライキ中です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the plural nominative noun phrase; introduces the subject ('Busfahrer').
Plural common noun; head of the subject NP performing the action.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person plural) expressing being on strike.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the action.

translations.en: Tomorrow we’re going on strike together.
translations.ru: Завтра мы вместе выйдем на забастовку.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng ta sẽ đình công cùng nhau.
translations.uk: Завтра ми разом вийдемо на страйк.
translations.hi: कल हम साथ में हड़ताल करेंगे.
translations.ja: 明日一緒にストライキします。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating future time; sentence-initial for emphasis.
Finite main verb (present, 1st person plural) agreeing with 'wir'.
Personal pronoun (1st person plural, nominative); subject of the clause.
Manner adverb specifying that the action is performed jointly.

sentences.target: Meine Apps streiken seit dem Update.

translations.de: Meine Apps streiken seit dem Update.
translations.en: My apps don’t work since the update.
translations.es: Desde la actualización, mis aplicaciones no funcionan.
translations.fr: Depuis la mise à jour, mes applis ne marchent plus.
translations.it: Dall’aggiornamento le mie app non funzionano.
translations.ko: 업데이트한 뒤로 내 앱들이 안 돼요.
translations.zh-Hans: 更新后我的应用不能用了。
translations.yue: 更新之後我啲應用程式用唔到。
translations.ru: После обновления мои приложения не работают.
translations.pt: Depois da atualização, meus aplicativos não funcionam.
translations.he: מאז העדכון האפליקציות שלי לא עובדות.
translations.vi: Từ sau khi cập nhật, các ứng dụng của tôi không hoạt động.
translations.nl: Sinds de update werken mijn apps niet.
translations.uk: Після оновлення мої додатки не працюють.
translations.hu: A frissítés óta nem működnek az alkalmazásaim.
translations.hi: अपडेट के बाद से मेरी ऐप्स काम नहीं कर रही हैं.
translations.pl: Od aktualizacji moje aplikacje nie działają.
translations.el: Μετά την ενημέρωση οι εφαρμογές μου δεν λειτουργούν.
translations.nb: Etter oppdateringen fungerer ikke appene mine.
translations.id: Sejak pembaruan, aplikasi saya tidak berfungsi.
translations.sv: Sedan uppdateringen fungerar inte mina appar.
translations.ro: După actualizare, aplicațiile mele nu mai funcționează.
translations.da: Siden opdateringen virker mine apps ikke.
translations.ja: アップデートしてからアプリが動かなくなった。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the subject noun; agrees in number/case with 'Apps'.
Plural common noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person plural) describing malfunction metaphorically as 'on strike'.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase ('seit dem Update').
Definite article (dative singular, neuter) within the PP headed by 'seit', modifying 'Update'.
Neuter noun (loanword); object of the preposition 'seit' in dative case.

sentences.target: Viele Kollegen streiken vor dem Rathaus.

translations.de: Viele Kollegen streiken vor dem Rathaus.
translations.en: Many colleagues are striking in front of the town hall.
translations.es: Muchos compañeros hacen huelga frente al ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: Beaucoup de collègues sont en grève devant l’hôtel de ville.
translations.it: Molti colleghi stanno scioperando davanti al municipio.
translations.ko: 많은 동료들이 시청 앞에서 파업하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 很多同事在市政厅前罢工。
translations.yue: 好多同事喺市政廳前面罷工。
translations.ru: Многие коллеги бастуют у здания мэрии.
translations.pt: Muitos colegas estão em greve em frente à prefeitura.
translations.he: הרבה עמיתים שובתים מול בניין העירייה.
translations.tr: Birçok meslektaş belediye binasının önünde grev yapıyor.
translations.vi: Nhiều đồng nghiệp đang đình công trước tòa thị chính.
translations.ar: كثير من الزملاء يضربون أمام مبنى البلدية.
translations.nl: Veel collega’s staken voor het stadhuis.
translations.hu: Sok kolléga a városháza előtt sztrájkol.
translations.hi: कई सहकर्मी टाउन हॉल के सामने हड़ताल कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πολλοί συνάδελφοι απεργούν μπροστά στο δημαρχείο.
translations.id: Banyak rekan kerja mogok di depan balai kota.
translations.ro: Mulți colegi fac grevă în fața primăriei.
translations.fi: Monet kollegat ovat lakossa kaupungintalon edessä.
translations.ja: 多くの同僚が市役所の前でストライキをしています。

tokens.explanation: Quantifying determiner modifying the subject noun ('Kollegen').
Plural common noun; head of the subject NP in nominative case.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person plural) describing the action.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article (dative singular, neuter) within the PP headed by 'vor', modifying 'Rathaus'.
Neuter common noun; object of the preposition 'vor' indicating place.
